name: Western Uranium & Vanadium Corp.
business: Western Uranium & Vanadium Corp. explores, develops, and mines uranium and vanadium resource properties in Utah and Colorado, United States. It sells uranium-bearing ore and plans to process uranium and vanadium into yellowcake and vanadium pentoxide. The company's primary customers are nuclear power plants and other uranium processors.

exposures.sentence: Western is in the business of exploring, developing, mining and production of its uranium and vanadium resource properties in the states of Utah and Colorado in the United States of America.

catalysts.event: Target commencement of uranium and vanadium processing at Mustang Mineral Processing Plant
catalysts.sentence: After permitting and construction, and subject to available financing, the processing of uranium and vanadium materials is targeted to commence in 2029.

catalysts.event: Submission of radioactive materials license application for Mustang plant
catalysts.sentence: The team will begin preparing the radioactive materials license application in 2Q 2026 targeting submission by October 2026.

catalysts.event: Ore Purchase Agreement with Energy Fuels Inc. deliveries completed
